title: Stapler Plier Stapler with 1000 Staples and Remover Set 20 Sheets Capacity Full Desktop Office Size Work
features: With 1000 Staples and Remover - 24/6 standard high quality staples can are the most common use staples in office, home or the staple size bought in local stores. One set to meet all your stapler needs.

Anti Impact Metal Body - Solid Full Metal Inside-Out Construction (no plastic part) efficiently resists impact, break, deform by accident drop or high frequency use. Durable and long lasting for office, commercial and business usage. 1 year product quality commitment for all customers if product broke or have any other quality issues.

Staple More Paper Sheets at a Time - Powerful stapler holds 20 sheets stapling capacity at a time. Also work perfect to staple on hardboard, cardboard, plastic bag, brown paper and any other hard paper. Meets all the daily office and home use needs and work for long lasting high frequency use.
Perfect Hand Hold Stapling - Say goodbye to finger hurts. Save up to 60% effort for stapling and reducing pain from hard push. Perfect hand hold size make you smoothly staple by only one hand.
Professional Fast Stapling - No jam, comfort, fast stapling make your work more efficient. Professional office supplies for teachers, students and all kinds of office, commercial and business.
description: Product Description For all these years, Lanhope has been focused on delivering products purposed to build on the idea of better living through convenience, enhanced experiences and affordability. Comfy Grip Feels good in the hand. Grap the end to staple. Ergonomic Design for not hurting hands while stapling. Large Capacity Staple up to 20 Sheets Capacity. Tackle much work at one time. Recommended especially for carpal tunnel syndrome. Labor Saving Save 60% Effort than using normal staplers. You don’t have to use much force at all to push it down to staple your papers. Full Metal Construction Each parts are Well-Made & Fine Finished for long lifetime. Do Not Loose. Smooth Mechanism A specially engineered inner rail delivers jam-resistant, accurate stapling. Must-Have Item Ideal for class work, office files, reports, bills, folders, craft projects, etc. Stapler & Staplers with Staples Remover Stapler & Staplers with Staples Remover Add To Basket Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.1 out of 5 stars 3,085 4.3 out of 5 stars 189 Price £18.99 £ 18 . 99 — no data Material Metal Metal & Plastic Staples 1000 Pcs 1000 Pcs Model of Staples 24/6, 26/6 24/6, 26/6 Bindable Thickness 2-20 sheets 2-25 sheets Color Sliver Sliver & Black
